hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd /home/ross-geller/Projects/personal/shadowing-companion/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd /home/ross-geller/Projects/personal/shadowing-companion/frontend && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -15; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.py$' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd /home/ross-geller/Projects/personal/shadowing-companion/backend && uvx ruff check "$f" 2>&1; } 2>/dev/null || true
